diagnoses.name: Acute kidney failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: Acute kidney failure and dysuria

diagnoses.name: Urinary tract infection
diagnoses.evidence_span: urinary tract infection. The pt was found to have significantly elevated creatinine on routine labs and endorsed dysuria and frequency

diagnoses.name: Chronic lymphocytic leukemia of B-cell type
diagnoses.evidence_span: chronic lymphocytic leukemia of B-cell type not in remission

diagnoses.name: Prior cerebral infarction with left-sided hemiparesis
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior cerebral infarction with resulting left-sided hemiparesis

diagnoses.name: Sick sinus syndrome
diagnoses.evidence_span: pacemaker for sick sinus syndrome

diagnoses.name: Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation
diagnoses.evidence_span: paroxysmal atrial fibrillation managed on anticoagulation

diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic coronary artery disease with angioplasty implant
diagnoses.evidence_span: atherosclerotic coronary artery disease s/p angioplasty implant

diagnoses.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic polyneuropathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic polyneuropathy and insulin dependence

diagnoses.name: Morbid obesity status post bariatric surgery
diagnoses.evidence_span: morbid obesity s/p bariatric surgery

diagnoses.name: Obstructive sleep apnea
diagnoses.evidence_span: obstructive sleep apnea

diagnoses.name: Hypothyroidism
diagnoses.evidence_span: hypothyroidism

diagnoses.name: Anxiety disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: anxiety disorder

diagnoses.name: Major depressive disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: major depressive disorder

diagnoses.name: Hypovolemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: the pt presented with signs of hypovolemia and acute kidney injury

diagnoses.name: Hematuria
diagnoses.evidence_span: hematuria noted on UA

diagnoses.name: Gastrojejunal ulcer
diagnoses.evidence_span: Given his history of gastrojejunal ulcer

diagnoses.name: Urinary retention
diagnoses.evidence_span: Given his history of gastrojejunal ulcer and urinary retention

diagnoses.name: Thrombocytopenia
diagnoses.evidence_span: given thrombocytopenia and iron deficiency anemia documented on admission

diagnoses.name: Iron deficiency anemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: given thrombocytopenia and iron deficiency anemia documented on admission

diagnoses.name: Hypertension
diagnoses.evidence_span: losartan potassium 50 mg for hypertension

diagnoses.name: Hyperlipidemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: atorvastatin 80 mg for his hyperlipidemia

diagnoses.name: Gout
diagnoses.evidence_span: allopurinol 100 mg for gout management

procedures.name: IV hydration with 0.9% sodium chloride and lactated Ringers
procedures.evidence_span: The patient was treated with IV hydration using 0.9% sodium chloride and lactated Ringers to address the hypovolemia component

procedures.name: Urinalysis cultures
procedures.evidence_span: Urinalysis cultures were obtained and grew organisms consistent with urinary tract infection

procedures.name: Point-of-care glucose monitoring
procedures.evidence_span: His insulin dosing (80, 30, 50, and 70 unit regimens) was optimized during admission with point-of-care glucose monitoring

procedures.name: Complete blood count trending
procedures.evidence_span: Complete blood count trending was followed given thrombocytopenia and iron deficiency anemia documented on admission

procedures.name: IV flushes with heparin and normal saline
procedures.evidence_span: IV flushes with both heparin (10 and 100 units/ml) and normal saline maintained vascular access
